title: nymphaea lotus var. thermalis
intro: Nymphaea lotus var. thermalis, also known as the Egyptian blue lotus, is a variant of the blue lotus plant that grows in Egypt's Nile delta region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Nymphaea lotus var. thermalis include its potential to aid in reducing anxiety and promoting sleep, as well as its ability to help alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms related to menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
